    }}>{`Plugin management`}</h1>
    <p>{`The UXP Developer Tool allows you to create plugins from templates or add existing ones to your developer workspace`}</p>
    <p>{`The UDT allows you to scaffold and import existing plugins into its workspace. You can decide to load them in the host application or keep them listed for future use.`}</p>
